evals.name: settings-panel
evals.prompt: Build a settings panel with sidebar navigation, collapsible groups, toggles, dropdowns, slider, and search bar using Chameleon.
evals.expected_output: Uses ch-sidebar, ch-navigation-list-render, ch-accordion-render, ch-switch, ch-combo-box-render, ch-slider, ch-edit with type=search

assertions.text: Uses ch-accordion-render for collapsible sections (not ch-accordion)
Uses ch-combo-box-render for dropdowns (not ch-select or ch-dropdown)
Uses ch-edit for search input (not ch-input or ch-search)
Uses native <button> for any buttons (not ch-button)

evals.name: dashboard-grid-chat
evals.prompt: Build a CRM dashboard with resizable split, data grid with pagination, AI chat panel, toolbar, and progress bar using Chameleon.
evals.expected_output: Uses ch-layout-splitter, ch-tabular-grid, ch-paginator-render, ch-chat, ch-action-group-render, ch-progress

assertions.text: Uses ch-tabular-grid for the data grid (not ch-grid or ch-data-grid)
Uses ch-chat for the AI assistant panel
Uses ch-progress for loading indicator (not ch-progress-bar)

evals.name: file-explorer-editor
evals.prompt: Build an IDE panel with tree view file explorer, tabbed code editors, and diff viewer using Chameleon.
evals.expected_output: Uses ch-tree-view-render, ch-code-editor, ch-code-diff-editor, ch-flexible-layout-render or ch-layout-splitter, ch-tab-render

assertions.text: Uses ch-tree-view-render for file tree (not ch-tree or ch-tree-view)
Uses ch-code-editor for the editor (not ch-editor or ch-monaco)
Uses ch-tab-render for editor tabs (not ch-tabs)
Uses ch-flexible-layout-render or ch-layout-splitter for layout

evals.name: registration-form
evals.prompt: Build a registration form with text fields, dropdown, radio buttons, checkbox, color field, rating, and submit button using Chameleon.
evals.expected_output: Uses ch-edit, ch-combo-box-render, ch-radio-group-render, ch-checkbox, ch-color-field, ch-rating, native <button>

assertions.text: Uses ch-edit for text inputs (not ch-input or ch-text-field)
Uses ch-radio-group-render for account type (not ch-radio-group)

evals.name: navigation-app-shell
evals.prompt: Build an app shell with collapsible sidebar, hierarchical nav menu, responsive top action bar, and tabbed content using Chameleon.

assertions.text: Uses ch-navigation-list-render for hierarchical nav (not ch-nav or ch-menu)
Uses ch-action-group-render for responsive toolbar (not ch-toolbar)

evals.name: content-viewer-feedback
evals.prompt: Build a doc viewer with markdown, code blocks, collapsible sections, progress bar, loading spinner, and tooltips using Chameleon.
evals.expected_output: Uses ch-markdown-viewer, ch-code, ch-accordion-render, ch-progress, ch-status, ch-tooltip

assertions.text: Uses ch-code for code blocks (not ch-code-block)
Uses ch-progress for progress bar (not ch-progress-bar)
Uses ch-status for loading spinner (not ch-spinner or ch-loading)
